String.description: Immutable sequence of UTF-16 characters inherited from JavaScript

Boolean.description: Logical data type with true and false values

Array.description: Ordered collection of values with integer indices, supports comprehensions

Object.description: Base prototype for all objects, used as key-value dictionary

Function.description: First-class function type, created with -> or => arrow syntax in CoffeeScript

RegExp.description: Regular expression type for pattern matching, supports heregex /// syntax

Date.description: Date and time representation with millisecond precision since Unix epoch

Error.description: Base error class for runtime exceptions and custom error types

Promise.description: Represents the eventual result of an asynchronous operation

null.description: Intentional absence of any object value

undefined.description: Default value for uninitialized variables and missing properties
